title: Part 4 – Exposé : rappel de rendez-vous médical
instructions: Écoutez le message, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Hello, this message is for patients with an appointment at Sunrise Medical Center this week. This is a reminder that your annual check-up is scheduled, and we ask that you arrive fifteen minutes early to complete some paperwork. Please bring a list of any medications you are currently taking, as well as your insurance card. If you need to reschedule your appointment, please call us at least twenty-four hours in advance, since late cancellations may result in a fee. Our office is located on the second floor of the Riverside Building, and parking is available in the lot behind the building. We look forward to seeing you soon.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of this message?
choices: To remind patients about an appointment
To advertise a health insurance plan
questions.explanation: Le message rappelle aux patients leur rendez-vous de bilan de santé annuel.

questions.prompt: What should patients bring to their appointment?
choices: A list of medications and an insurance card
A copy of their ID only
questions.explanation: "Please bring a list of any medications you are currently taking, as well as your insurance card".

questions.prompt: What happens if a patient cancels late?
choices: They may be charged a fee
They must wait a month for a new appointment
questions.explanation: "late cancellations may result in a fee".
